settings.title: GOLDEN OUD
settings.description: A majestic, rich fragrance capturing the pure essence of liquid gold, precious agarwood, and warm spices on volcanic rock.

settings.title: VELVET AMBER
settings.description: An opulent and sensual fusion of dark amber, sweet resins, and hot spices bathed in a glowing crystal sunset.

settings.title: MIDNIGHT ROSE
settings.description: A seductive, deep romance of dark damask rose petals entwined with precious black amber and smooth patchouli.
